backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management with access control, user profiles, and admin functionality. Includes methods for saving/retrieving clips, managing user profiles, and authorization checks using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing components, hooks, and configuration files for the Beast Clipping application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file with Tailwind directives and custom CSS variables defining a comprehensive design system using OKLCH color space with light and dark mode support.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component setting up TanStack Router with QueryClient, managing video playback state, clip selection, AI suggestions, and admin route protection with authentication checks.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors in the admin panel with detailed error information, stack traces, and recovery options.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component displaying statistics, trending analytics, user identity with copy-to-clipboard functionality, and error handling with retry capability.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a video clip card with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog. Supports selection state and click handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components, with loading and empty states. Handles clip selection and deletion.
Displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with viral scores and timestamps. Allows users to select suggestions to populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating video clips with start/end timestamp inputs and title field. Handles clip creation, validation, and updates from selected clips or suggestions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header containing branding, authentication button, and admin panel link. Manages Internet Identity login/logout and navigation.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form for entering YouTube URLs with validation and video loading. Includes button to trigger AI clip generation for the loaded video.
Badge component displaying viral potential scores with color-coded styling and icons (flame, trending, sparkles) based on score thresholds.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: React component that renders a responsive YouTube video player embedded in a Card using an iframe with a 16:9 aspect ratio.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating an anonymous or authenticated actor based on Internet Identity and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend actor using React Query.
Hook that provides AI-powered clip generation functionality, currently using mock data to suggest viral clip segments with titles and timestamps, with a mutation to save generated clips.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Hook that handles clip creation with a viral score calculation based on duration and title characteristics, providing a mutation to save clips to the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Hook that fetches all video clips from the backend and provides a mutation to delete clips with loading state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Hook that manages clip timestamp state (start/end minutes/seconds), provides validation, formatting, and conversion utilities for time ranges.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Hook that checks if the current authenticated user is a persistent admin by calling the backend's isPersistentAdmin method with extensive logging for debugging.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor using React Query.
Hook that provides utilities to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a design system with light and dark theme color palettes using HSL color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider and InternetIdentity provider wrapping the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking architectural decisions, known issues (admin panel permission checking stuck, AI clip generation not implemented), and completed features for a YouTube video clipping application with admin authentication.
